title: Open-source AI agent workflow for auditing Solidity smart contracts
abstract: Tired of auditing Solidity smart contracts? Fear not, this open-source AI agent workflow is here to help! Just like your personal auditor, it's user-friendly and full of humor, making the contract audit process a breeze. Give it a try!
abstract_zh: 你还在为审查Solidity智能合约烦恼吗？别担心，这个开源AI代理工作流来帮你了！它就像你的私人审计师，轻松上手，幽默风趣，让你的合约审查过程充满乐趣。快来试试吧！
